title: Brook Steals the Road Poneglyph Copy
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Reiju, Pudding, Pedro, Judge, Sanji, Jinbe as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Sixth Floor Guest Room: Sanji's Room

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: More

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: more

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes... the groom, Sanji, is sleeping tight in his room.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No mistaking it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: do not let him out of there until morning.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and do not let anyone else in either. Keep guard.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Remember if you are not

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it! I fell asleep- Nasu! In Lord Sanji's bed!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Is Lord Sanji not back yet- Nasu?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Then, I guess I'll get...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: A bit more sleep- Nasu.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Second Floor Meeting Room

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that means pekoms was with them until they entered our territory!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: They're trying to save Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Pudding led 6 people to this island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Soul King is in Mama's hands right now.

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: Pedro ...blew himself up

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: In the 3rd floor courtyard, right,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Count?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Indeed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's two down.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And of the four that entered the seducing woods,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The Rabbit and the racoon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I received word from sister Bruce

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: This morning that she had captured them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: So that's 4 out of 6 down.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The outstanding problems are these two, the ones that took down brother cracker

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: and managed to escape the seducing woods.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do believe we managed to lock them up in the prisoner's library under- ground.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But why are there rumors of their escape being spread around?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: brother Opera! What of this news that jinbe has appeared?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Baseless Drivel!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many times do you want me to say it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where even is that shark?! I haven't the slightest clue!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No one's come underground at all-fa!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As Mama told me, I tried to torture Lola's whereabouts

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Out of them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But they didn't know a thing, so I just burned them alive!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I admit that was overdoing it, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you've stooped to suspecting your own brother, Mont D'Or!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way in hell I can tell them I couldn't guard the prisoners!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama'll drain the life right out of me-fa!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So then we can cross out these two as well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What about Sanji

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: And the Vinsmoke family?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of them have been confirmed to be inside their rooms.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Alright! That's that! The intruders are gone!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The preparations for tomorrow are underway in the giant kitchen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tomorrow, for our beloved little sister, pudding ...Let's make this wedding one to remember!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keep watch till morning. I don't trust opera.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Roger!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 54 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
